question: Is the text "Galactic Federation Interstellar Navigation Chart: Sector 7 Border Zone, Unexplored Territory" rendered with perfect spelling, punctuation, and capitalization?
Is the navigation chart text formed by constellation star points connected by thin lines?
Is the text "Communication Link Failure: Severe Electromagnetic Nebula Interference, Primary Signal Lost" rendered with perfect spelling, punctuation, and capitalization?
Does the communication failure warning text appear to coalesce from nebula dust or mist?
Is the text "Interstellar Cargo Freighter USCSS Nostromo, Port of Registry: Earth" rendered with perfect spelling, punctuation, and capitalization?
Is the vessel name text displayed as metal-etched lettering with a cold glow on the space station hull?
Is the text "Orbital Mechanics Data: Eccentricity 0.002, Perigee Altitude 400.5 km" rendered with perfect spelling and numerical accuracy?
Is the orbital mechanics data displayed on an astronaut helmet HUD?
Is the text "Life Support System Alert: Critical Oxygen Leak Detected, Seal Section A Immediately" rendered with perfect spelling, punctuation, and capitalization?
Is the life support alert rendered in a scrolling dot matrix screen style within a corridor?
Is the text "Cargo Hold Overview: Rare Mineral Samples 330 Tons, Hazard Class IV" rendered with perfect spelling and numerical accuracy?
Is the cargo manifest text arranged using a cluster of floating ice crystals?
Is the text "Relative Navigation Data: Target Velocity 25000 m/s, Deceleration Burn in Progress" rendered with perfect spelling and numerical accuracy?
Is the relative velocity data integrated into the streaks of a comet tail?
Is the text "Rover Status Report: Surface Exploration Complete, Battery Low, Preparing for Return" rendered with perfect spelling, punctuation, and capitalization?
Is the rover status text formed by lunar rover tracks etched in the dust?
Are all text elements free from garbled characters, unrecognizable symbols, or merged strokes?
Is the overall image rendered in a poetic sci-fi illustration style (non-photorealistic) rather than a realistic photograph?
Are the text areas clear and legible, avoiding excessive blur or obscuring artifacts?
